answer: Standard delivery usually takes 3-7 business days depending on your location.
Shipping cost is calculated at checkout based on address and order size.
Eligible items can be returned within the return window. Refunds are processed after quality inspection.
We support major debit/credit cards and Cash on Delivery where available. Payment options are shown at checkout.
Accepted payment methods include debit/credit cards and Cash on Delivery in eligible areas. Please check checkout for options in your location.
